recap: Spain defeated France 2-0 in the World Cup semifinal behind a penalty conversion from Mikel Oyarzabal in the 22nd minute, after teenager Lamine Yamal drew a foul from Lucas Digne in the box with intelligent pressing. Pedro Porro doubled Spain's lead in the 58th minute following a quick combination with Dani Olmo, while Yamal was denied what would have been a third goal by a marginal offside decision. The victory marked Spain's third consecutive tournament semifinal win over France in as many years and sent them to the final to face either Argentina or England.
